description: Style Notefootwear for men, from ESTD.1977, is designed in the studios of London and Milan to provide comfort to the fashion conscious man using the finest of handcrafted leathers and highest manufacturing techniques.   So pair this sandal with with your off-duty ensembles and look good from head-to-toe.  Product DetailsBrown sandal with fabric thong style straps in colourful stripes and a toe separatorMildly padded footbed with branding on the heelTPR outsole with an upraised heelMaterial and CareLeather, fabricWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dustUse a leather conditioner and a brush for added shine
